app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: An AI-second, searchable treasure chest o' accessibility findings to quickly plunder into yer manual reports
search.label: Describe what ye observed
search.placeholder: arr: modal close button, no name on the wretched thing
search.hint_submit: Scrawl yer description an' press Hunt or Enter, ye scallywag.
search.hint_ai: Ye AI first mate be at yer service ({provider}).
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: No booty found for '{query}'. Try a component name, element type, or a different phrase, ye scallywag.
results.no_results_body: Try a component name (e.g. 'button'), element type (e.g. 'input'), or a different phrase, arrr.
detail.fails: Fails the code of the sea:
detail.location_placeholder: arr: All Seven Seas: / The Hold: / Product Cove pages:
detail.rem_label: Possible suggested fix steps, says I
detail.refine_hint_ai: Describe what to change and AI will rewrite and incorporate yer updates or details. Change yer AI model or turn this off in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Edit the fields above yerself, or scribble changes here. Enable yer AI in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: an' it'll rewrite based on yer orders.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: arr: this be specific to mobile vessels, element be a tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Example: "Findings o' Critical severity like this be found throughout the Onboarding Flow. There be a possibility lower severity issues will be found after they're fixed."
detail.rewrite_aria: Save yer note an' revise selected fields with AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: This field be empty as Davy Jones's locker. Nothin' to plunder.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Ye've made sweeping changes to this here text. Resettin' will walk the plank with all yer edits.
settings.heading: Captain's Quarters
settings.ai_enable_desc: Revises Descriptions and/or Suggested Fix based on yer AI Instructions.
settings.privacy_body_1: Right now, everything be stored locally in yer browser usin' localStorage. Nothin' be sent to us or any server. Stored data includes: theme, language, platform filter, Live Search setting, AI provider preference, API keys, rankings, stars, archived items, pinned items, recent findings, custom findings, personal corpus edits, and yer last opened finding.
settings.privacy_body_2: API keys be stored in yer browser only and sent directly to the AI provider ye have configured. We never lay eyes on 'em nor receive 'em. Ye can remove them at any time from the AI settings below, or by clearin' yer browser's site data for this here page.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations and the base public corpus were translated usin' AI and may contain errors. No user-entered data, custom findings, or personal edits be ever sent for translation.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion be on, ye scallywag. Animations like confetti be walked the plank. To bring 'em back, turn off reduced motion in yer OS accessibility settings.
notfound.heading: 404 — Charted No Waters Here!
notfound.body: This page be nowhere to be found. Set sail back to the home port.
party.announce_full: Treasure mode activated, arrr! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have changed to a blazin' bright palette. Colorful confetti be fallin' from the crow's nest in all manner of colors and shapes. The mouse cursor is now a cutlass.
party.announce_reduced: Treasure mode activated, arrr! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have changed to a blazin' bright palette. The mouse cursor is now a cutlass. Confetti walked the plank because reduced motion be turned on.
kofi.aria: Support Mikey on Ko-fi (opens the hatch)
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
about.what_heading: What manner o' ship be this?
about.what_body: This be a treasure trove of accessibility findings for manual audits, arr. Search for what ye observed, find a description that fits, and plunder it into yer report.
about.what_wcag: Coverage extends up to WCAG 2.2 (Level A and AA) across both web and native app waters.
about.step_1_body: Scrawl what ye observed — a component name, element type, or plain-speak description.
about.step_2_body: Use the Priority Up/Priority Down arrows on each result to tune how results be ranked. Star to show first. Archive to hide it, below deck.
about.step_3_body: Select the findin' that best matches. Results be ranked by relevance.
about.step_4_body: Add a location prefix (e.g. "Global:") or use AI to help revise the wording, savvy.
about.feature_ai_body: Use AI to rewrite a finding based on yer notes, matey. Bring yer own API key from Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google. It stays in yer browser and is never sent to us. Set it up in
about.feature_languages_body: The UI be available in over 50 tongues includin' RTL support. Switch in Captain's Quarters.
about.feature_party_body: Arr, it be in the Captain's Quarters. Under Ship's Colors. Ye'll know it when ye see it.
about.feature_a11y_body: Built to WCAG 2.2, as any worthy vessel should be. Includes focus management, live regions, full keyboard navigation, reduced motion support, and high-contrast color tokens.
about.coming_auth: Optional sign-in with Google or GitHub to sync yer settings across vessels.
about.coming_custom: Add and edit yer own custom findings, stowed privately in the cloud.
about.coming_ai: Additional AI providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, and more, arrr.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: This will walk all saved settings off the plank — including yer API keys — and return everything to port defaults. This cannot be undone, sailor.
settings.unsaved_body: Ye have unsaved changes, arr. What would ye like to do?
settings.language_changed_announce: Tongue: Course Altered, press ye Stow button to confirm, arr!
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
announce.starred: {title} starred — will appear first in relevant results, front o' the fleet.
announce.archived: {title} archived and hidden from results, sent to Davy Jones.
announce.unarchived: {title} restored to results, back from the deep!
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Copy the description and suggested fix steps directly into yer spreadsheet or report.
search.view_all_confirm_body: This will show {count} results on this single page, the whole lot.
detail.undo_last_announce: Revision undone, like it never happened.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Include Findin' Details / Description in revision
detail.revise_error_body: Somethin' went wrong while revisin', blast it. Press Save & Revise Selected to try again.
settings.api_key_error: Error: API key be required when AI Assist is enabled, arr.
error.heading: Blimey, Something Went Wrong
error.body: The findin' library could not be loaded. Check yer connection and
settings.no_changes_body: Nothin' to save, the hold be empty.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}), ye scallywag. Double-check yer key in Settings.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a moment and try again, patience be a virtue even at sea.
detail.revise_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}), shiver me timbers. Try again in a few seconds.
detail.revise_error_network_error: No internet connection, we be adrift! Check yer connection and try again.
settings.reset_all_announce: All Settings Reset and Data Cleared, arrr.
about.what_body_2: Consistency be the treasure, especially in this industry, and I wanted to make sure I stayed consistent with impact, severity, descriptions, and the oft-times similar suggested technical suggested fix steps. Search this homebrew library of WCAG-aligned finding write-ups, plunder the one that matches yer observation, customize or add specifics to it, and copy/paste it straight into yer audit report.
error.announce: Blimey, somethin' went wrong! The findin' library could not be loaded. Check yer connection and try again, ye scallywag.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Plunder the description and suggested fix together, matey
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Toss the description and suggested fix back to their original quarters
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Receive ads from crews in the accessibility and developer communities. Yer privacy be respected, no trackin', no profiles, no algorithms.
onboarding.heading: Ahoy, welcome to A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Ye haven't reached the end o' the tour yet, matey. Shove off now and skip the rest?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Describe what ye observed: a component name, symptom, or WCAG success criterion. Use the Platform and WCAG Level filters to narrow the corpus. Use Narrow Results to filter within what be already showin'. Results be sorted by relevance, then by severity.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Open a finding to spy its title, WCAG criterion, description, and suggested fix. Add a location prefix to the description (e.g. 'Global:'). Use AI Assist to revise any field usin' yer notes, then plunder fields one by one or use Copy All to grab the whole treasure at once.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app coverage be more limited than web.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 result be pinned and always shown.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} results be pinned and always shown.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 be starred and will always show on top.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} be starred and will always show on top.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 be archived and will always show at the end o' the list o' results.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} be archived and will always show at the end o' the list o' results.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: This will show 1 result on this here single page.
search.view_all_confirm_dont_ask: Don't ask me again, ye hear!
results.sort_live_hint: Live Search be on. Results will sort straight away after enterin' or makin' a selection change.
results.summary_query: Showin' results fer '{query}', sorted by '{sort}', narrowed by '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Smart sortin' orders by Severity first, then by yer personal rankin' score. Starred items always appear at the top; Archived items always appear at the bottom. This be the default sort order.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA criteria have selective support in this here corpus. Not all AAA success criteria be represented, and some entries marked AAA may reflect best-practice guidance rather than strict conformance targets.
results.sort_popularity_info: In a future update, this will reflect aggregated global popularity based on user interactions across all accounts. Fer now, popularity be session-based and resets when ye close the app.
results.rank_hint: Rank results up or down to adjust how they sort. Star to show first. Archive to hide. (Can be undone, savvy.)
results.unpin_from_search: This result be pinned. Unpin to include it in search results.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Openin' a new findin' will toss yer collapsed panel and any unsaved changes into Davy Jones' locker.
detail.ai_revision_hint: Select which fields to revise usin' the checkboxes above, add yer notes here, and AI will rewrite those fields. To change the AI model or turn this off, set sail to
detail.finding_note_hint: Add context here, ye scallywag: location, severity notes, or anything project-specific. Enable AI Assist in
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: and it'll rewrite based on yer notes.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: e.g. this here be specific to mobile, element is a tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: e.g. Critical severity, found throughout the Onboarding flow. Lower severity issues may surface once these be fixed.
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Somethin' went wrong while revisin', arr. Press Save & Revise Selected to try yer luck again.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}), ye landlubber. Double-check yer key in Settings.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a moment and try again, patience be a virtue.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Try again in a few seconds, the seas'll calm.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: No winds in yer sails! Check yer connection and try again, ye scallywag.
help.take_tour_description: Replay the onboarding tour to revisit how A11yFred works, ye curious buccaneer.
help.step_1_body: Results appear as ye type. Use the Platform filter in Settings to choose Web or Native App findings (most are web-focused). Use +term to require a word and -term to exclude one (e.g. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_3_body: Select the finding that best matches what ye observed, matey. Results are sorted by relevance first, then by severity.
help.step_4_body: Add a location prefix to the description (e.g. 'Global:' or 'Cart:'). If AI Assist is on, add yer notes to the Revision Notes field and AI will rewrite the finding to match yer context.
help.step_5_body: Copy the description and suggested fix into yer spreadsheet or report. Use Copy All to grab both fields at once, savvy?
help.shortcuts_note: Shortcuts are only active when focus is on the result list, arr. Use them to quickly navigate and rate findings without leaving the list.
about.what_body_2_prefix: The same issues crop up on nearly every vessel — err, site. This tool keeps yer descriptions consistent across reports so ye be not writin' from scratch each time. The library was built from real audit work, then refined with AI for plain language, consistency, accuracy, and fact-checking against
about.feature_agentic_body: If ye use Claude (Anthropic), ye can also enable Match Existing Style. The AI will search past revision examples to match the tone and depth ye have already established, not just rewrite the current finding in isolation.
settings.party_confirm_body: Things be about to get very weird and possibly inaccessible, ye brave soul.
settings.pending_save_note: {unsaved} Press {save} button to make it so.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: This here translation were conjured by AI and has not been reviewed by native Rohingya speakers.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: The Rohingya people have endured genocide and forced displacement. Use this translation with care, and consider contributin' corrections if ye be able.
settings.platform_all_desc: Show all plunder across web, native apps, and documents.
settings.ranking_on: Ranking controls be visible on each result.
settings.ranking_off: Ranking controls be hidden from sight.
settings.starred_results_desc: Starred items always rise to the top, in the order they were starred, arrr.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archived items always be lurkin' at the very bottom of results.
settings.rankings_desc: Up and down ranks ye have given to results. The higher a result be ranked above the others, the earlier it appears in yer search.
settings.rankings_empty: No ranking data to speak of.
settings.confirm_reset_all_intro: This cannot be undone, ye hear?
onboarding.slide_2_body: Use Rank Up/Down to rank yer findings by importance, ye scallywag. Star a finding to always hoist it to the top. Pin a finding to keep it anchored at the bow across all searches.
search.hint_ranking: Use Rank Up/Down to adjust how yer results be sorted. Star a result to always hoist it to the top.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Use +term to require a word and -term to walk it off the plank (e.g.
results.sort_severity_desc: Severity: High Seas to Best Practice
results.sort_severity_asc: Severity: Best Practice to High Seas
detail.sources_badge_multiple_aria: Sources: Multiple, aye. See the references below, matey.
detail.include_title_when_copied: Haul the title when ye plunder
detail.include_desc_title_when_copied: Haul the Description title when ye plunder
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Haul the Suggested Fix title when ye plunder
detail.reset_all_done_desktop: All Plunder Returned to the Hold
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ↑ = Hoist th' current result up
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ↓ = Send th' current result down th' plank
